subject: Pelipper, a large pelican-like seabird Pokemon with a massive yellow beak-pouch, blue and white body, small wings outstretched, flying forward with an open-mouthed cheerful expression
description: A large blue-and-white seabird Pokemon fills most of the frame, flying directly toward the viewer with wings spread and its enormous yellow beak-pouch gaping wide open in what reads as a joyful or excited expression. The body is compact and rounded, with white underparts and blue wings. Behind the figure, a bright blue sky and calm water surface are visible, suggesting an open coastal or sea environment. The scene is warm and lighthearted with soft natural lighting.
foreground: Pelipper in flight, beak open wide, wings outstretched
background: blue sky, calm water surface, coastal scenery
emotion: joyful, enthusiastic — wide open beak, forward rush energy
